required_fields.label: Key metrics this period
required_fields.placeholder: MRR/ARR, customer count, growth rate, burn rate, runway remaining, and other KPIs you track...

required_fields.label: Top highlights and wins
required_fields.placeholder: What went well this period? Major milestones, customer wins, product launches, partnerships...

required_fields.label: Challenges and learnings
required_fields.placeholder: What was hard? What didn't go as planned? What did you learn?

required_fields.label: Priorities for next period
required_fields.placeholder: What are the top 3-5 priorities for the coming month or quarter?

optional_fields.label: CEO / sender name
optional_fields.placeholder: Name of the person sending the update

optional_fields.label: Cash position and runway
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., $1.2M cash, 14 months runway at current burn

optional_fields.label: Product updates
optional_fields.placeholder: New features shipped, tech debt addressed, infrastructure changes...

optional_fields.label: Team updates
optional_fields.placeholder: New hires, departures, open roles, team size...

optional_fields.label: Fundraising status
optional_fields.placeholder: If currently raising: status, pipeline, timeline...

optional_fields.label: Asks of investors
optional_fields.placeholder: Introductions, advice, resources you need from your investors...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload financial summary, P&L, or metrics dashboard export
Upload prior investor updates for consistency

sections.label: TL;DR
sections.instructions: 3-5 bullet points capturing the most important updates. Investors should be able to read only this section and know the state of the company.

sections.label: Key Metrics
sections.instructions: Dashboard-style metrics with current values, month-over-month change, and vs. target. Use a consistent format each period for comparability.

sections.label: Milestones and Wins
sections.instructions: Celebrate wins and progress. Include customer logos won, product milestones, partnership announcements, and press coverage.

sections.label: Challenges
sections.instructions: Be transparent about what is hard. Investors respect honesty and it builds trust. Frame challenges with what you are doing about them.

sections.label: Burn Rate and Runway
sections.instructions: Current monthly burn, cash in bank, and months of runway. Compare to last period. Flag if runway is below 12 months.

sections.label: Product Updates
sections.instructions: Major features shipped, user feedback incorporated, and upcoming product roadmap items.

sections.label: Team Updates
sections.instructions: New hires with brief intros, departures, current headcount, and open roles you are hiring for.

sections.label: Upcoming Priorities
sections.instructions: Top 3-5 priorities for the next period. Be specific and measurable so investors can track progress in the next update.

sections.label: Asks
sections.instructions: Specific, actionable requests of investors. Introductions to specific people, advice on specific topics, or resources needed.
